race.name: GFNY Bahamas
race.tagline: Ride through paradise on a flat and fast Caribbean course.

vitals.location: West Bay Street near Goodman's Bay Park, Nassau, New Providence Island, The Bahamas

climate.overview: Tropical Caribbean climate with warm temperatures and potential wind; specific averages unavailable.

terrain.overview: Flat and fast course with moderate climbing on paved roads through western New Providence Island.

logistics.explanation: Accessible via Nassau's major airport with scenic start/finish; lacks detailed accommodation info.

length.explanation: 60.8-mile long course suits mid-distance endurance; medium option adds flexibility.

technicality.explanation: Flat, fast roads with no technical demands.

elevation.explanation: Moderate 1,390 ft gain, not minimal but manageable.

climate.explanation: Caribbean paradise with wind as main challenge.

adventure.explanation: Scenic loops with beach views offer mild adventure.

prestige.explanation: New GFNY event with growing series prestige.

race_quality.explanation: Chip timing, official jersey, and pro-level winners indicate solid organization.

experience.explanation: Breathtaking Caribbean setting with family-friendly vibes.

community.explanation: Part of global GFNY series fostering international participation.

field_depth.explanation: Inaugural event drew world champions; field size unknown.

expenses.explanation: Bahamas travel likely premium; event specifics missing.

cultural_impact.explanation: Promotes Bahamas sports tourism as new event.

biased_opinion.overview: GFNY Bahamas delivers a dreamy Caribbean escape with flat speed and stunning views, perfect for a fun GFNY entry without gravel grind—pure vacation vibes on two wheels.

final_verdict.one_liner: Flat-fast paradise ride in Nassau's turquoise playground.
final_verdict.full_verdict: Inaugural success with world champs signals promise; ideal for scenic endurance without suffering.

logistics.overview: Start/finish at Goodman's Bay Park; group rides during race week.
logistics.accommodation: Nassau offers hotels, resorts near start; details sparse.
logistics.registration_notes: Long course for rankings; jersey mandatory; pricing unavailable.

history.overview: Founded 2024 as GFNY expansion; inaugural on 2024: November 3.
notable_moments: Italians (2024 GFNY Worlds champs) dominate windy inaugural.

course_description.character: Flat and fast loops through western New Providence with Caribbean beach views; two loops for long route.
course_description.signature_challenge: Wind on flat coastal roads testing endurance.

non_negotiables: Long course for rankings and qualifiers

citations.title: GFNY comes to The Bahamas this November 3rd
Italians win first ever mass participation cycling race in The Bahamas

research_metadata.gaps: GPS, field size, registration costs, detailed weather, airports noted as unavailable.
